question: Write a function void findMinMax(int arr[], int &min, int &max, int size) that finds the minimum and maximum values in an array and stores them in the reference variables min and max.
errors: Inefficient algorithm: Sorting the array (O(N^2) or O(N log N)) to find min and max when a linear scan O(N) is sufficient.
Modifies the input array which might not be intended.
